revision.comment: ページ [[多聞寺]] を [[多聞寺 (船橋市)]] へ移動: 曖昧さ回避
revision.text: #REDIRECT [[多聞寺 (船橋市)]]

'''多聞寺'''（たもんじ）は、日本の仏教寺院。 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]にある、[[日蓮宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (船橋市)]]''' *[[神戸市]][[垂水区]]にある、[[天台宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (神戸市)]]''' *[[兵庫県]][[加西市]]にある、[[曹洞宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (加西市)]]''' *[[香川県]][[小豆郡]][[土庄町]]にある、[[高野山真言宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (土庄町)]]''' など。 {{aimai}}

'''多聞寺'''（たもんじ）は、日本の仏教寺院。 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]にある、[[日蓮宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (船橋市)]]''' *[[兵庫県]][[神戸市]][[垂水区]]にある、[[天台宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (神戸市垂水区)]]''' *兵庫県[[加西市]]にある、[[曹洞宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (加西市)]]''' *[[香川県]][[小豆郡]][[土庄町]]にある、[[高野山真言宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (土庄町)]]''' など。 {{aimai}}

'''多聞寺'''（たもんじ）は、日本の仏教寺院。 *[[千葉県]][[船橋市]]にある、[[日蓮宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (船橋市)]]''' *[[兵庫県]][[神戸市]][[垂水区]]にある、[[天台宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (神戸市垂水区)]]''' *兵庫県[[加西市]]にある、[[曹洞宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (加西市)]]''' *[[香川県]][[小豆郡]][[土庄町]]にある、[[高野山真言宗]]の寺院。'''[[多聞寺 (土庄町)]]''' など。
==関連項目== *[[多聞院]]（曖昧さ回避） {{aimai}}

revision.text:
'''Tammonji''' (多聞寺) refers to Buddhist temples in Japan.
* {{ill|Tammonji (Funabashi)|ja|多聞寺 (船橋市)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Nichiren Buddhism|ja|日蓮宗}}, located in {{ill|Funabashi City|ja|船橋市}}, [[Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Sumida)|ja|多聞寺 (墨田区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Chisan Sect of Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗智山派}}, located in {{ill|Sumida Ward|ja|墨田区}}, [[Tokyo]]. * A former temple of the {{ill|Sōtō Sect|ja|曹洞宗}} located in {{ill|Setagaya Ward|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo (abolished). Refer to {{ill|Mishuku Shrine|ja|三宿神社}}. * {{ill|Tammonji (Higashikurume)|ja|多聞寺 (東久留米市)}} - A temple of the Chisan Sect of Shingon Buddhism, located in {{ill|Higashikurume City|ja|東久留米市}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tarumi Ward, Kobe)|ja|多聞寺 (神戸市垂水区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Tendai Sect|ja|天台宗}}, located in {{ill|Tarumi Ward|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe City]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Kita Ward, Kobe)|ja|多聞寺 (神戸市北区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Shingon Sect|ja|真言宗}}, located in {{ill|Kita Ward|ja|北区 (神戸市)}}, Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Tammonji (Kasai)|ja|多聞寺 (加西市)}} - A temple of the Sōtō Sect, located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tsurugi, Tokushima)|ja|多聞寺 (徳島県つるぎ町)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Omuro Sect of Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗御室派}}, located in {{ill|Tsurugi Town|ja|つるぎ町}}, {{ill|Mima District|ja|美馬郡}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tonosho, Kagawa)|ja|多聞寺 (香川県土庄町)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon Sect|ja|高野山真言宗}}, located in {{ill|Tonosho Town|ja|土庄町}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡}}, [[Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Tammon-in|ja|多聞院}} (disambiguation)
{{DEFAULTSORT:Tammonji}}
{{Aimai}}

'''Tammonji''' (多聞寺) refers to Buddhist temples in Japan.
* {{ill|Tammonji (Funabashi)|ja|多聞寺 (船橋市)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Nichiren Buddhism|ja|日蓮宗}}, located in {{ill|Funabashi City|ja|船橋市}}, [[Chiba Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Sumida)|ja|多聞寺 (墨田区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Chisan Sect of Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗智山派}}, located in {{ill|Sumida Ward|ja|墨田区}}, [[Tokyo]]. * A former temple of the {{ill|Sōtō Sect|ja|曹洞宗}} located in {{ill|Setagaya Ward|ja|世田谷区}}, Tokyo (abolished). Refer to {{ill|Mishuku Shrine|ja|三宿神社}}. * {{ill|Tammonji (Higashikurume)|ja|多聞寺 (東久留米市)}} - A temple of the Chisan Sect of Shingon Buddhism, located in {{ill|Higashikurume City|ja|東久留米市}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tarumi Ward, Kobe)|ja|多聞寺 (神戸市垂水区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Tendai Sect|ja|天台宗}}, located in {{ill|Tarumi Ward|ja|垂水区}}, [[Kobe City]], [[Hyōgo Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Kita Ward, Kobe)|ja|多聞寺 (神戸市北区)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Shingon Sect|ja|真言宗}}, located in {{ill|Kita Ward|ja|北区 (神戸市)}}, Kobe City, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Tammonji (Kasai)|ja|多聞寺 (加西市)}} - A temple of the Sōtō Sect, located in {{ill|Kasai City|ja|加西市}}, Hyōgo Prefecture. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tsurugi, Tokushima)|ja|多聞寺 (徳島県つるぎ町)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Omuro Sect of Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗御室派}}, located in {{ill|Tsurugi Town|ja|つるぎ町}}, {{ill|Mima District|ja|美馬郡}}, [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tammonji (Tonosho, Kagawa)|ja|多聞寺 (香川県土庄町)}} - A temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon Sect|ja|高野山真言宗}}, located in {{ill|Tonosho Town|ja|土庄町}}, {{ill|Shōzu District|ja|小豆郡}}, [[Kagawa Prefecture]].
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Tammon-in|ja|多聞院}} (disambiguation)
{{DEFAULTSORT:Tammonji}}
{{Aimai}}
